task_title: Which product draws the most complaints

scores.justification: Agent successfully linked tickets to products via user orders (e.g., ticket t019 user u042 to orders o102/o107/o115 containing specific product IDs like p044, p021, p048, p028, p018, p033, p010, p023).
Agent retrieved all 30 tickets using `--limit 30` and confirmed this was the full set by examining the default limit behavior and retrieving all 120 orders to cross-reference.

Agent identified p073 (Umbrella Field Kit Mk 2), p037 (Globex Heat Sink Mk 1), and p023 (Consumable Ink) as the top products with 5 distinct tickets each, backed by systematic analysis linking problematic orders to ticket-filing users.

Agent did not provide direct quotes from ticket subjects or bodies in the final answer; the analysis was computational but the final message lacks explicit ticket subject/body quotes supporting the conclusion.
